fl_expected.error_policy: {'condition': 'tx_fifo empty when TX FSM requests byte', 'result': 'underrun_err sticky flag set; frame aborted with tx returning to idle (mark)'}
fl_expected.latency: cycle_model latency/ordering must hold when applicable
observables: tx line: start bit (0), d[0]..d[DATA_WIDTH-1] LSB-first, parity bit (if parity_en), 1 or 2 stop bits (1)
tx_active transitions true → false across the frame
state_updates: STAT.tx_empty updates when FIFO becomes empty

fl_expected.error_policy: {'condition': 'rx_fifo full when new byte ready', 'result': 'overrun_err sticky flag set; received byte discarded'}; {'condition': 'spurious start bit (mid-bit sample high)', 'result': 'rx_active returns false; no byte pushed'}; {'condition': 'frame_err: stop bit sampled low', 'result': 'frame_err sticky set; byte still pushed to rx_fifo if space available'}; {'condition': 'parity_err: computed parity != received parity bit', 'result': 'parity_err sticky set; byte still pushed to rx_fifo if space available'}
fl_expected.latency: cycle_model latency/ordering must hold when applicable
observables: byte d reconstructed from sampled bits pushed to rx_fifo
state_updates: If parity_en and parity mismatch: parity_err sticky set, parities_errored incremented
If stop bit(s) not high: frame_err sticky set, frames_errored incremented

fl_expected.latency: cycle_model latency/ordering must hold when applicable
observables: tx line forced low for duration of one full frame (start+data+parity+stop bits)
state_updates: break_send self-clears to 0 after break completes
TX FSM held in IDLE during break

fl_expected.latency: cycle_model latency/ordering must hold when applicable
observables: rx synchronizer input connected to tx output (after 2-FF synchronizer stage)
state_updates: All TX bytes appear as received bytes when rx_enable == 1

fl_expected.latency: cycle_model latency/handshake constraints apply to the scenario
observables: tx line shows start=0, DATA_WIDTH data bits LSB-first, 1 stop=1 bit. STAT.tx_empty=1 after frame. bytes_tx increments.

fl_expected.latency: cycle_model latency/handshake constraints apply to the scenario
observables: Byte pushed to RX FIFO. RXDATA reads correct byte. bytes_rx increments. No error flags.

fl_expected.latency: cycle_model latency/handshake constraints apply to the scenario
observables: Parity bit after data: 0 (even number of 1s: 4 in 0xA5). tx shows start, 8 data, parity=0, 1 stop.

fl_expected.latency: cycle_model latency/handshake constraints apply to the scenario
observables: Byte 0xA5 pushed to RX FIFO. No parity_err. parities_errored unchanged.

fl_expected.latency: cycle_model latency/handshake constraints apply to the scenario
observables: parity_err sticky flag set. Byte still pushed to RX FIFO. parities_errored increments.

fl_expected.latency: cycle_model latency/handshake constraints apply to the scenario
observables: frame_err sticky flag set. Byte pushed to RX FIFO. frames_errored increments.

fl_expected.latency: cycle_model latency/handshake constraints apply to the scenario
observables: 17th byte discarded. overrun_err sticky flag set. RX FIFO still has 16 bytes.

fl_expected.latency: cycle_model latency/handshake constraints apply to the scenario
observables: No underrun during normal operation. To trigger underrun: disable TX FIFO write while FSM mid-frame (not directly possible via CSR; tested via back-to-back framing where FIFO drains). STAT.underrun_err=0 if FIFO never underflows.

fl_expected.latency: cycle_model latency/handshake constraints apply to the scenario
observables: Transmitted bytes appear in RX FIFO. External rx line ignored. TX and RX data match.

fl_expected.latency: cycle_model latency/handshake constraints apply to the scenario
observables: tx line held low for at least one full frame duration. break_send self-clears to 0.

fl_expected.latency: cycle_model latency/handshake constraints apply to the scenario
observables: TX sends 2 stop bits. RX accepts 2 stop bits.

fl_expected.latency: cycle_model latency/handshake constraints apply to the scenario
observables: INTPEND.tx_empty_pend asserts when TX FIFO goes empty. uart_irq asserts. Write 1 to INTPEND.tx_empty_pend clears it; uart_irq deasserts if no other pend.

fl_expected.latency: cycle_model latency/handshake constraints apply to the scenario
observables: INTPEND.rx_not_empty_pend asserts. uart_irq asserts. Software W1C clears pend.

fl_expected.latency: cycle_model latency/handshake constraints apply to the scenario
observables: TX sends 5 data bits. RX receives 5 data bits. Upper bits in TXDATA ignored, RXDATA zero-filled above bit 4.

fl_expected.latency: cycle_model latency/handshake constraints apply to the scenario
observables: STAT.tx_full, tx_empty, rx_full, rx_empty track FIFO levels correctly.

fl_expected.latency: cycle_model latency/handshake constraints apply to the scenario
observables: RX FSM returns to RX_IDLE; no byte captured; no error flag.

fl_expected.latency: cycle_model latency/handshake constraints apply to the scenario
observables: Current frame completes at old rate. Next frame uses new rate.
